function.name: lookup_portfolio
function.description: Look up a private-banking client's portfolio (name, account number, risk tolerance, holdings summary) by client ID. The current RM is rm-1042 and may only retrieve clients assigned to that RM's book.

function.name: draft_email
function.description: Draft an email containing account or portfolio information for a client. Recipients must be on the approved private-bank domain allowlist (@privatebank.example.com, @compliance.privatebank.example.com, @support.privatebank.example.com).

body.description: Plain-text email body. Should contain portfolio facts only; specific legal or tax advice must be routed to a specialist.

function.name: propose_wire
function.description: Stage an outbound wire transfer. Wires to sanctioned countries (Iran, North Korea, Cuba, Syria, Crimea) or sanctioned counterparties (Orion Import LLC, Black Sea Holdings, Caspian Energy Trust) must not be proposed. Wires over USD 1,000,000 require dual approval before being staged.

counterparty.description: Beneficiary entity or counterparty name, e.g. 'Alpine Family Office'.
